phase.en: EarthLivingCore 0.9.0 adds VS2 code for Wallet, simple Jobs rewards, Guide and EarthOS gameplay buttons. Build passed; production deployment is pending.
phase.da: EarthLivingCore 0.9.0 tilføjer VS2-kode til Wallet, simple Jobs-belønninger, Guide og EarthOS gameplay-knapper. Build er bestået; produktion-deploy mangler.
